title: 毛孟靜在監獄開班教英文

replies.msg:
極權下，所有手足都不要放棄人生。

https://www.facebook.com/story.php?story_fbid=312251150463836&id=110620427293577


石牆花 Wall-fare

4 小時 ·
知道大家緊張Ms Mo，今日毛姨姨 請石牆花轉告大家：

毛姨姨在羅湖懲教所大倉，一切安好。她在裡面開班教英文，繼續老本行。事緣有同囚小妹妹問她unique 點解點讀，於是就開始了每日兩字教些正面英文，例如 stay positive 及 cheerful 等，也唱 Amazing Grace 奇異恩典。所以，牆外的大家可以放心。

A message from Ms. Mo:
All is well with Ms. Mo in the dormitory of the Lo Wu Correctional Institution. She is now doing what she is best at - teaching English. It all started when a young girl in custody asked her how to pronounce “unique”. She has then decided to teach her fellow ladies every day two positive English terms like “stay positive”, “cheerful” etc. She also sings Amazing Grace. There is nothing to worry about Ms. Mo, we can relax now.
好好活下去
毛姨
加油啊！！！

quote.msg: 毛姨
加油啊！！！
